mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tournament ORDER BY held_date DESC
SELECT * FROM tournament WHERE status != 'FINISHED' ORDER BY held_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament (name, held_date, capacity, total_rounds, win_point, lose_point, participation_point, bracket_group_size, status, description, venue, icon_path, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{heldDate}, #{capacity}, #{totalRounds}, #{winPoint}, #{losePoint}, #{participationPoint}, #{bracketGroupSize}, #{status}, #{description}, #{venue}, #{iconPath}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tournament SET name = #{name}, held_date = #{heldDate}, capacity = #{capacity}, total_rounds = #{totalRounds}, win_point = #{winPoint}, lose_point = #{losePoint}, participation_point = #{participationPoint}, bracket_group_size = #{bracketGroupSize}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, venue = #{venue}, icon_path = #{iconPath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tournament SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tournament SET current_round = #{round}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entry WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entry WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND checkin_flg = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entry WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND dropout_flg = 1
